comments.body: Now includes updates to avoid newly deprecated interfaces.

The c/storage PR was merged, and requires Buildah updates from this PR to avoid now-deprecated interfaces.

So, leaving this PR open, and ready for merge at some point. Merging it before the eventual vendor dance, and running the new code base in the meantime, might also improve our confidence in the c/storage changes a bit.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *mtrmac*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah).
